subject: Project Management
title: The Space Shuttle Program
description: Learn The Space Shuttle Program in one minute.

hook.text: NASA promised a reusable spacecraft that would launch weekly and cut costs 90%. It did neither.

buildup.text: The shuttle was designed by committee — the Air Force, Congress, and NASA all wanted different things.

discovery.text: Compromise produced a vehicle that was neither cheap, safe, nor simple to maintain.

twist.text: Two shuttles were lost — Challenger in 1986 and Columbia in 2003 — killing 14 astronauts.

climax.text: The shuttle flew 135 missions before retirement. It worked, but never as promised.

punchline.text: Design by committee built a camel that could fly.

quiz.question: What was the main problem with the Space Shuttle's design process?
options: Design by committee produced too many compromises
